rows.requirement: Resource planning API and governed commands
evidence: apps/api/src/phase6Runtime.ts implements deterministic Phase 6 resource load read model, overload detail, reservation mutation, non-mutating resolution preview, guarded apply command, stale preview rejection, and action execution readback

apps/api/src/app.ts exposes GET /api/resources/load, GET /api/resources/load/:bucketId, GET /api/resources/overloads/:overloadId, POST /api/resources/reservations, POST /api/resources/overloads/:overloadId/preview, POST /api/resources/overloads/:overloadId/apply, and GET /api/resources/audit

apps/api/src/phase6ResourcePlanningApi.test.ts covers deterministic buckets, overload severity/affected entities, dry-run no mutation, apply readback, audit/action evidence, unauthorized apply denial, tenant isolation, stale preview, invalid preconditions, reserve_capacity rejection as non-resolution, and reservation sourceType contract alignment
e2e/tests/phase6/*.spec.ts prove API routes through browser flow plus direct API readback, permission denial, audit/action evidence, reload persistence, and cleanup/reset

evidence: apps/web/src/resourcePlanningApiClient.ts implements the Phase 6 web API client for resource load, overload detail, reservation, preview, apply, and audit routes, matches API loadPercent DTO, and aligns reservation sourceType with the API/domain contract

apps/web/src/ResourceLoadControlSurface.tsx implements a Russian Resource Load Control management surface with load buckets, overload signal, affected assignments/reservations, primary preview action, reservation action, audit panel, loading/empty/error/permission states, API readback refresh, and Gantt opener visibility only for explicitly available schedule projects

apps/web/src/ResourceLoadControlSurface.test.tsx covers load rendering, loading/empty/error/denied states, preview without mutation, apply readback/audit evidence, read-only command denial, stale preview recovery, reload/refetch clearing local preview state, and available-only Gantt opener behavior

E2E-050..052 prove the browser surface renders load buckets, overload signal, starts governed preview from the control surface, and does not expose a broken unavailable Gantt action for the Phase 6 fixture project

rows.requirement: Overload resolution dry-run and apply flow
evidence: apps/api/src/phase6Runtime.ts and apps/api/src/phase6ResourcePlanningApi.test.ts provide API-level dry-run/apply support for shift_work, permission checks, stale preview rejection, action/audit readback, and reject reserve_capacity as an overload resolution because reservations add demand rather than reduce overload

apps/web/src/ResourceLoadControlSurface.tsx exposes the recommended overload resolution flow with dry-run preview, confirmation, stale-preview recovery, refreshed resource load readback, visible action/audit evidence, and no broken Gantt transition for unavailable schedule projects
e2e/tests/phase6/overload-resolution-entry.spec.ts proves entry from the Resource Load Control surface into preview flow and verifies unavailable Gantt action is not exposed
e2e/tests/phase6/resolution-dry-run.spec.ts proves before/after preview does not mutate API state or audit
e2e/tests/phase6/resolution-apply-audit.spec.ts proves apply changes load, writes action/audit evidence, refreshes projection, survives reload, and reset cleans state
e2e/tests/phase6/resource-resolution-permissions.spec.ts proves read-only UI denial and direct backend denial for read-only and cross-tenant users
